description: My name is Rutger Hendrickx, a 28 years old Full Stack Developer from the bright city of Leuven, Belgium.

I love turning complex problems into simple, clean and intuitive systems. My main focus is on Web development but I would love to explore the Native Mobile world a lot more. Because of my focus on Web I currently use a toolset that consists of TypeScript, React, NodeJS, GraphQL and much more.
